outlook.summary: Spot is testing the critical Gamma Flip confluence at 558. Negative 0DTE GEX implies aggressive dealer hedging, while the Reverse Smirk and elevated Max Pain (566) suggest an upward directional bias towards the magnetic target.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest across all three expiries (0DTE 20k, Weekly 5k, Monthly 30k). Ultimate structural floor.

0DTE Max Pain level. Strong magnetic attraction for price settlement maximizing dealer profits.
